resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def canBeTypedWords(self, text: str, brokenLetters: str) -> int:
        broken = set(brokenLetters)
        return sum(all(char not in broken for char in word) for word in text.split())
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n + m)
space complexity: O(m)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The approach uses a set for efficient lookups of broken letters and a generator expression within the built-in sum function to count the words that can be typed.
